Quick Start

中文

This quick start guide will help you get up and running with Your Project in minutes.

Basic Usage

Here's a simple example to get started:

import your_module

# Initialize the module
your_module.init()

# Use the main function
result = your_module.do_something()
print(f"Result: {result}")

Configuration

You can configure the module using environment variables:

export YOUR_MODULE_CONFIG=path/to/config.json
export YOUR_MODULE_DEBUG=true

Or programmatically:

your_module.configure(
    debug=True,
    config_path="path/to/config.json"
)

Next Steps

  • Check out the API Reference for detailed API documentation

  • Read the API Guides for more advanced usage guides

  • Visit the About page to learn more about the project
